{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Suriel's warm marble
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Suriel's warm marble]] is an item carried by [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17">''Unsouled'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
